examples: A brougham stood on the road before the little outside platform.
There she alighted, walked for an hour, rejoined her brougham and returned home at a fast trot.
Then there had been the pleasurable excitement of choosing a showy grey stepper for May's brougham.
He stopped the brougham at Hyde Park Corner, alighted and never saw her again.
Large groups of youths have been involved in confrontations in Brougham Street and the Waterworks park over several weekends.
